candidate_llm_application: Espalier-trellis adapter: human-authored offline sparse trellis prior with out-of-trellis gradient zero + sequential cumulative fine-tune + compositional trellis union

results.judge_justification: MLAE explicitly uses FIXED MASK strategy for LoRA experts — gradients constrained to mask = out-of-mask gradient zero. This is operationally the espalier discipline. Composition across experts also covered.
ProxSparse: once mask is fixed after K steps, weight-space remains constant (out-of-mask zero) — functionally equivalent to espalier trellis once authored.
Sparse adapter merging across PEFT experts captures the compositional-trellis-union leg of the candidate.
NAS designs adapter structure but is a search-based prior, not human-authored offline.
Alignment-Constrained Dynamic Pruning; safety constraints but not a structural authored-prior trellis.
